metadata.title: Dr. Guilherme Carvalho | Physiotherapist in Natal, Brazil
metadata.description: Specialist physiotherapist in spine care, chiropractic, osteopathy and acupuncture in Natal, Brazil. Individualized treatment for lower back pain, disc herniation, sciatica and more.

hero.titleAccent: Specialist care for disc herniation and sciatica.
hero.descriptionFull: Regain confidence in your spine. Specialist physiotherapist in spine care. Personalized assessment and individualized treatment. In-person in Natal, Brazil and teleconsultation available worldwide.
hero.descriptionShort: Specialist spine physiotherapist. In-person in Natal and online worldwide.
hero.imageAlt: Dr. Guilherme Carvalho holding an anatomical spine model

symptoms.title: Do you experience any of these symptoms?
symptoms.subtitle: Do any of these sound familiar? These may be signs of a condition that needs attention.
symptoms.calloutText: This may be a sign of nerve compression caused by disc herniation or joint dysfunction — and it can get worse if left untreated.
symptoms.calloutCta: Does this sound like you? See how to treat it
symptoms.group1s0: Pain that runs down your leg to the foot
symptoms.group1s1: Tingling or numbness in the arm or leg
symptoms.group1s2: Feeling of weakness in the legs or arms
symptoms.group2s1: Pain after sitting or standing for a long time
symptoms.group2s2: Already tried treatment with no improvement

services.title: How can I help you?
services.subtitle: Choose the best type of care for your situation
services.onlineNote: Teleconsultation: Answer 5 questions in 2 minutes and find out if I can help you online.
services.ebookTitle: Practical Guide — Relieve Your Disc Herniation and Sciatica
services.ebookSubtitle: For those suffering from lower back pain who want relief without relying only on medication.
services.ebookB3: Strategies to relieve sciatic nerve pain

method.title: From Pain Mapping to your recovery
method.subtitle: A unique process that starts by mapping your pain to treat it at its source
method.step1Desc: Together we create a complete map of your pain: where it hurts, when it worsens, what brings relief. We identify the pattern to treat the cause, not just the symptom.
method.step2Desc: Based on your Pain Map, we build a tailored protocol: specific techniques, ideal frequency and clear recovery goals.
method.step3Desc: Therapeutic exercises, chiropractic, osteopathy, dry needling, acupuncture — we apply the right techniques for your case. Multiple specializations in pain management, always with your active participation.
method.step4Desc: You leave knowing how to take care of your body to prevent relapse. The goal is for you not to depend on me forever.

about.title: Dr. Guilherme Carvalho
about.subtitle: Clinical Physiotherapist · Natal, Brazil
about.bio: With over five years of experience and dozens of specializations in chronic pain, plus postgraduate degrees in Osteopathy, Chiropractic and Acupuncture. I see patients in-person in Natal and online across Brazil and worldwide.
about.quote: My goal is to transform my patients' lives, making them healthier and more confident. I want you to understand how to act in the face of back pain, offering effective treatments that avoid unnecessary medications and surgeries.

triage.title: Quick screening for back pain
triage.subtitle: Answer a few quick questions to find out if online care can help you.
triage.alertNoticeBold: Some symptoms indicate the need for urgent in-person medical care.
triage.q6label: 6. Do you have any of these symptoms?
triage.alertTitle: These symptoms may require urgent in-person medical evaluation.
triage.alertSubtitle: Please seek medical attention as soon as possible.
triage.alertBack: I made a mistake — go back
triage.doneTitle: Your case can be evaluated via online consultation.
triage.doneSubtitle: Click below to schedule your consultation.
triage.waGreeting: Hello, Dr. Guilherme! I completed the online screening and would like to schedule my teleconsultation.
triage.q2label: Does your pain radiate to any limb?
triage.q2o1: No, it stays in the spine
triage.q2o2: Goes to the buttock or thigh
triage.q2o3: Runs down the leg to the foot or toes
triage.q2o4: Goes to the arm or hand
triage.q3label: How long have you had this pain?
triage.q3o4: Comes and goes for months or years
triage.q4label: What usually makes your pain worse?
triage.q4o4: Standing still for a long time
triage.q5label: Have you had imaging done (MRI or CT scan)?
triage.q5o2: Yes, but I don't remember the result
triage.q5o4: I suspect I have a herniation
triage.d1: Complete loss of strength in leg or arm
triage.d2: Difficulty controlling urination or bowel movements
triage.d3: Intense numbness in the groin area
triage.d5: Incapacitating pain that does not improve in any position
triage.q7o2: Yes, but I still have pain

location.title: Where are we located?
location.addressLine1: Cidade Alta neighborhood, Rua João Pessoa, 198.
location.addressLine3: Downtown Natal, Rio Grande do Norte, Brazil
location.importantText: We do not accept health insurance plans. Private care with full focus on your treatment.

finalCta.title: Still in pain? Send me a message now.
finalCta.subtitle: No commitment. Just a conversation to understand your situation and see if I can help.
finalCta.note: I'll respond as soon as possible · In-person and online care
